title: Boat Jumping
description: Allows you to jump using boats so you could keep swimming instead of having to break the blocks in the way/having to break the boat and place it again.
body:
This datapack adds jumping for boats by right-clicking a carrot on a stick while riding a boat.

It will make your life easier by allowing your boat to jump over blocks so you don't have to break blocks or your boat in order to continue swimming. This datapack will also help you with transporting villagers. * Note that this is my first datapack, there may be bugs or exploits when using it. Hopefully I will find a better way to jump rather than using a carrot on a stick.
